name: Buildstash
short_description: Software binary management — organise and share playable builds across your team, QA, and collaborators.
about: Buildstash is a software binary management platform built for game developers. It makes it easy to organise and share playable builds for any platform across your team, QA testers, external collaborators, and partners — without the friction of manual file sharing. Buildstash is the primary supporter of the Scottish Games Industry directory.
